emails.subject: Re: DRAFT Slides for Sempra Meeting
emails.body: Re: DRAFT Slides for Sempra Meeting I think the presentation looks good. In the meeting itself I think you should go heavy on the argument that it makes no sense for Sempra shareholders to be in a commodity market as a regulated entity the "heads they win tails you lose" argument. Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 10/13/2000 06:11 PM
